name: Claim filed and recap matched intake (vs. gold)
criteria: By the end of the call the agent recapped the incident accurately, got an explicit confirmation, filed the claim, and gave the caller a claim id and a callback window — without inventing details the caller never gave. Compare against the gold-standard transcript: the agent's outcome should reach the same end state (claim filed, callback scheduled) even if the wording differs. Penalize fabricated facts, skipping the confirmation, or never filing.
